seedText.value: A harbor archivist finds a ledger that predicts which beacon will fail. The keeper knows the ledger is accurate, but revealing that fact could expose the rescue route.

immutableFact.value: The ledger can predict a beacon failure, but it cannot change the failure by itself.

focalDesire.value: Elian wants the rescue route before the north beacon loses its final light.

counterpartDesire.value: Mira wants to protect the route from anyone who will treat it as disposable knowledge.

stakes.value: If they fail to agree, the rescue boat will enter the harbor without a working signal.

knowledgeAsymmetry.value: Mira knows the ledger has never made a false prediction, while Elian does not.

forbiddenDevelopment.value: No character may erase the ledger's prediction or create a new beacon without paying a declared cost.

endingCondition.value: The scene ends when Elian earns the route or accepts a different obligation before the light fails.

acceptedCost.value: Elian may owe Mira a future rescue that takes priority over his own assignment.

recommendedAction.value: Offer Mira custody of the ledger

recommendedConsequence.value: Mira shares the rescue route because Elian makes her safeguard part of the agreement.

alternativeAction.value: Seal the ledger and ask for one signal only

alternativeConsequence.value: Mira gives one temporary signal, but Elian leaves without the route and owes her another negotiation.

relationshipPressure.value: Elian strengthens the bond by accepting custody terms and damages it by treating Mira's warning as disposable.

sceneTwo.value: The failing beacon forces Elian to choose whether Mira's custody terms matter more than immediate speed.

sceneThree.value: The ledger identifies a second failure and reveals that the safe route depends on Mira's withheld signal.

sceneFour.value: The rescue boat enters the outer harbor while Elian's earlier promise returns as a debt he must honor.

sceneFive.value: Elian and Mira face the darkened beacon together and the accumulated trust determines which route survives.
